programme.title: Fox and Hare Save the Forest
programme.desc: One day, Fox and Hare discover that Owl has disappeared. They go looking for him in the forest with all their friends and discover a big lake that wasnt there before. It is the beginning of an exciting and funny adventure.

programme.title: The Canterville Ghost
programme.desc: Sir Simon de Canterville has been haunting the grounds of his country estate for more than 300 years, but he soon meets his match when he tries to scare off a modern-day American family that just moved in.

programme.title: Rebellious
programme.desc: A headstrong princess is stolen by an evil sorcerer, and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Flushed Away
programme.desc: A spoiled rat gets flushed down the toilet and finds himself stranded in Londons sewer underworld. A savvy scavenger helps him evade frog assassins and make his way back to his plush home.

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: When the beast-themed Animilitia plague Gotham, Batman swings out to investigate. But with The Penguin and his cyber-animals added to the mix, Batman will need the help of Green Arrow and The Flash to bring them to heel.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: An ordinary chameleon, Rango, winds up in the town of Dirt, a lawless outpost in the Wild West in need of a new sheriff.

programme.title: Fox and Hare Save the Forest
programme.desc: One day, Fox and Hare discover that Owl has disappeared. They go looking for him in the forest with all their friends and discover a big lake that wasnt there before. It is the beginning of an exciting and funny adventure.

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, leads a fierce team of secret ninja warriors to defeat the evil warlord Garmadon and save Ninjago City.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr., whos intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison and vows revenge against Gru.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Flightless birds lead a mostly happy existence, except for Red, who just cant get past the daily annoyances of life. His temperament leads him to anger management class, where he meets fellow misfits Chuck and Bomb. Red becomes even more agitated when his feathered brethren welcome green pigs to their island paradise. As the swine begin to get under his skin, Red joins forces with Chuck and Bomb to investigate the real reason behind their mysterious arrival.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: Red, Chuck, Bomb and the rest of their feathered friends are surprised when a green pig suggests that they put aside their differences and unite to fight a common threat. Aggressive birds from an island covered in ice are planning to use an elaborate weapon to destroy the fowl and swine way of life. After picking their best and brightest, the birds and pigs come up with a scheme to infiltrate the island, deactivate the device and return to their respective paradises intact.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, finds himself on a wild outdoor adventure when his long-lost father draws him into a high-stakes heist.

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, leads a fierce team of secret ninja warriors to defeat the evil warlord Garmadon and save Ninjago City.

programme.title: The Canterville Ghost
programme.desc: Sir Simon de Canterville has been haunting the grounds of his country estate for more than 300 years, but he soon meets his match when he tries to scare off a modern-day American family that just moved in.

programme.title: Rebellious
programme.desc: A headstrong princess is stolen by an evil sorcerer, and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: A sloth named Laura and her family move to the big city with nothing but their prized family recipe book and a rusted old food truck. The familys delicious food soon catches the eye of a quick-witted cheetah named Dotti.

programme.title: The Sloth Lane
programme.desc: A sloth named Laura and her family move to the big city with nothing but their prized family recipe book and a rusted old food truck. The familys delicious food soon catches the eye of a quick-witted cheetah named Dotti.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Lighthearted adventures of a pair of news vendors in New York - one deaf, one blind - who go on the run when they are blamed for the murder of a customer. Each has seen - or heard - just a whiff of a clue, and a frantic chase ensues as the duo struggle to clear their names.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The story of a pair of blues musicians who try to raise the money to save an orphanage by reuniting their old band - nearly writing off Chicago in the process.

programme.title: Quartet
programme.desc: A long-smouldering flame is rekindled when a once-popular opera star reunites with her ex-husband and fellow performers at a retirement home for musicians.

programme.title: Finding Your Feet
programme.desc: A middle-class snob on the eve of retirement takes refuge with her bohemian sister after she discovers her husband is having an affair with her best friend.

programme.title: Its Complicated
programme.desc: When attending their sons college graduation, a couple reignite the spark in their relationship. However, the complication lies in the fact that they are divorced and he has remarried.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: Playboy vet Henry sets his heart on romancing Lucy, but she has short-term memory loss; she cant remember anything that happened the day before. So every morning, Henry has to woo her again. Her friends and family are very protective, and Henry must convince them that hes in it for love.

programme.title: Click
programme.desc: A workaholic father finds that there are not enough hours in the day to balance his job and home life, until he discovers a remote control that can pause and rewind time. However, when it malfunctions, chaos ensues, and the man realises that he has lost control of his life.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Love Actually
programme.desc: Weaving in and out of the love lives of eight loosely inter-related couples. The bachelor Prime Minister falls for his personal assistant, his brother-in-law is flirting with one of his colleagues, a writer heads off to France and pursues an affair with a maid, and an 11-year-old boy asks his father for advice on matters of the heart.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A recently engaged woman becomes obsessed with meeting the grieving widower she heard on a late night radio show. Sam, the widower, receives hundreds of letters following the radio phone-in which was instigated by his son Jonah.

programme.title: Youve Got Mail
programme.desc: Two rival bookstore owners are unaware that they are conducting a secret romance with each other on the Internet. When they discover the truth, they must prevent their business rivalry from interfering with their growing personal intimacy.

programme.title: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Electronics store stock boy Andy Stitzer is horrified when he is found out as a virgin by his workmates - just when he thought he was becoming one of the gang. David, Jay and Cal surprise him by making it their mission to get him a girl and help him lose his virginity.

programme.title: Kangaroo Jack
programme.desc: Two childhood friends get caught up in with the mob in New York and find themselves forced to travel to Australia to deliver $50,000. Their trouble really starts when they reach the outback, and a kangaroo bounds away with the cash.

programme.title: Kangaroo Jack
programme.desc: Two childhood friends get caught up in with the mob in New York and find themselves forced to travel to Australia to deliver $50,000. Their trouble really starts when they reach the outback, and a kangaroo bounds away with the cash.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: A wealthy law student and a lower-class music student meet and fall in love while at Harvard. In the face of parental disapproval, they marry and are blissfully happy, until they discover that she has a fatal disease.

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: Whimsical but engaging western about a drifter who saves a woman from a gang of marauders. The cowboy is astonished to learn that the woman is a nun, especially when he witnesses her heavy drinking and cigar-smoking ways. The unlikely pair embark on a voyage of discovery as they become embroiled in the Mexican War.

programme.title: American Sniper
programme.desc: Based on the autobiography by Chris Kyle.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music thats always been inside him.

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: When ex-German international and camp commandant Van Steiner suggests a match between the POWs and the Germans, it swiftly escalates into a propaganda exercise.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Hard-drinking country music star Jackson Maine discovers, and falls in love with, a struggling but talented singer named Ally. As her career quickly takes off, Jackson starts to realize that his best days may be behind him.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased fathers fortune, and a bright but awkward youth whos tired of his mothers depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Based on the true story of an unsophisticated single mother who stumbles upon an environmental cover-up. While working for a lawyer, she is puzzled by an old case and decides to do some research of her own. She discovers that a chemical company knowingly polluted the local area, and with the help of the lawyer launches a class action to sue the company for damages.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a sex worker from Brooklyn, gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as the parents set out for New York to get the marriage annulled.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: In 1991, talented figure skater Tonya Harding becomes the first American woman to complete a triple axel during a competition. In 1994, her world comes crashing down when her ex-husband conspires to injure Nancy Kerrigan, a fellow Olympic hopeful, in a poorly conceived attack that forces the young woman to withdraw from the national championship. Hardings life and legacy instantly become tarnished as shes forever associated with one of the most infamous scandals in sports history.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: In 1991, talented figure skater Tonya Harding becomes the first American woman to complete a triple axel during a competition. In 1994, her world comes crashing down when her ex-husband conspires to injure Nancy Kerrigan, a fellow Olympic hopeful, in a poorly conceived attack that forces the young woman to withdraw from the national championship. Hardings life and legacy instantly become tarnished as shes forever associated with one of the most infamous scandals in sports history.

programme.title: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Two adopted brothers and rival dancers are thrust together when they are both invited to audition for the World Breaking Championships.

programme.title: Mouse Hunt
programme.desc: Slapstick tale which follows the misfortunes of two hard-up brothers whose plans to renovate and sell a valuable building are jeopardised by a rogue mouse. The brothers soon find themselves pulling out all the stops in order to evict their tiny resident.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug
The Godfather
programme.desc: The violent story of a Mafia family fighting to establish supremacy in the American business world following World War II, where an assassination attempt leaves Vito Corleone too ill to run the family business, forcing his sons Michael and Sonny to lead the Corleones into a vendetta-filled war with other mob families.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: An international hit man and quick-change artist is hired by a secret organisation to assassinate Charles de Gaulle.

programme.title: The Fisher King
programme.desc: When a DJs sardonic exhortation to a late-night caller to wipe out a bar full of yuppies is taken literally, his world falls apart. Years later, on the point of suicide, he is saved by a similar casualty, a former medievalist whose wife was a victim of the bar bloodbath, and offered a chance for redemption by the mans quest for the Holy Grail.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: Once the highly regarded composer to the Viennese Court, Salieri is now an old man, unknown and confined to an asylum. After a suicide attempt he recounts his story to a young cleric, going back 30 years to his heyday at the court of Emperor Joseph II, where he first met the young Mozart. Despite Salieris Machiavellian attempts to frustrate Mozarts progress, the great young composer attracts the favour of the Emperor.

programme.title: Three Days of the Condor
programme.desc: A bookish library clerk working for a CIA front is hunted after he stumbles across a covert intelligence operation. Returning from lunch, he finds the entire office massacred. Using his codename Condor, he contacts the CIA, but when an agent tries to kill him, he kidnaps a stranger off the street to ensure his survival and attempts to turn the tables on those who want him dead.

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A desperate and crazed man, with the help of an accomplice, takes a local Brooklyn bank hostage with plans to rob it in order to pay for his lovers sex-change operation.

programme.title: The Towering Inferno
programme.desc: At the opening party of a colossal, but poorly constructed office building, a massive fire breaks out that threatens to destroy the tower and everyone in it.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The curse of an ancient mummy protects buried treasure in the Egyptian desert. An American mercenary who knows of the secret location is rescued from a Cairo prison by an English historian and her brother, and together they set off on a hunt. Along the way, the trio encounter flesh-eating scarab beetles, killer sandstorms, and reincarnated demons.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: In an attempt to avenge the violent death of his parents, Bruce Wayne fights to rid the city of crime and in particular, his nemesis the Joker. However, his defences come down when an attractive journalist tries to track down the truth behind sightings of a huge bat-like figure in the sky.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: After Selina Kyle sees more than she should in her bosss office, she has an `accident, falling from the top floor of the building to the street below. Awoken by the licking of cats, she is surprised to find herself still very much alive. She vows to take revenge on her boss and becomes a female avenger, defending women under attack and providing assistance to Batmans efforts to keep the streets of Gotham safe.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: A hit man falls for his bosss wife when he is asked to escort her on a date, a boxer reneges on his promise to throw a big fight, and a couple attempt a heist that rapidly escalates out of control.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: A hit man falls for his bosss wife when he is asked to escort her on a date, a boxer reneges on his promise to throw a big fight, and a couple attempt a heist that rapidly escalates out of control.

programme.title: Arcadian
programme.desc: In the near future on a decimated Earth, Paul and his twin sons face terror at night when ferocious creatures awaken. When Paul is nearly killed, the boys come up with a plan for survival, using everything their father taught them to keep him alive.

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: Roland Deschain, the last Gunslinger, must prevent the Man in Black from toppling the Dark Tower, the key that holds the universe together.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programme.desc: Volcanologist Trevor Anderson journeys into the Earths core after discovering evidence that the famous authors story was based on fact. Accompanied by his teenage nephew Sean and fellow scientist Hannah, Trevor is soon coming face-to-face with an astonishing and extremely perilous hidden world.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: A teen and his new stepfather find an island of secrets, strange life forms and gold after they answer a coded distress signal.

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: Aquaman must retrieve the legendary Trident of Atlan to save the underwater city of Atlantis -- and the surface world -- from his power-hungry brother.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Scary chiller about a coastal community plagued by a killer shark. With the summer tourist season at hand, the mayor is keen to keep the first attack hushed up. However, when an expert claims that the attacks are the work of a giant great white shark, there is only one solution - to kill the monster fish before it can feed again.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Another great white shark arrives to terrorise the holiday resort of Amity Island. Having recovered from the grisly events of four years ago, the island is once again packed with tourists. Families are sailing in the bay and swimming off the beach, but when two divers and a water-skier go missing, the local police chief fears that he is about to relive his greatest nightmare.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: Second sequel to Steven Spielbergs 1970s blockbuster transports the action from Amity Island to a new undersea kingdom attraction in a Florida theme park. The capture of a baby great white shark is big news and brings crowds to the park - until its mother arrives on the scene.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: Effects-laden blockbuster about a huge reptile which emerges from the sea to wreak havoc in Manhattan. On a research trip to Chernobyl, a young scientist discovers a startling link between genetic mutation and radioactivity. When a fishing trawler is attacked by an unseen creature, and other evidence of a massive reptilian creature is unearthed, he realises that the creature is following a destructive path to New York.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Another great white shark arrives to terrorise the holiday resort of Amity Island. Having recovered from the grisly events of four years ago, the island is once again packed with tourists. Families are sailing in the bay and swimming off the beach, but when two divers and a water-skier go missing, the local police chief fears that he is about to relive his greatest nightmare.

programme.title: Jaws III

programme.desc: Cutter and the team are still reeling from Stephens death when an anomaly opens in the British Museum, and a terrifying creature that resembles an Egyptian god emerges. Bader was shot down over France and captured. His indefatigable resolve saw him try to escape so often, and eventually he was confined to Colditz until the end of the war.

Well, James has - and with the help of dynamic motion graphics, he will distill the sensuous secrets and explain how our world is really just one big laboratory.

programme.title: Borderforce: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A man fears for his life after being stopped by a cartel in Laredo, clubbers in Detroit are found with drugs disguised in liquid, and officers stop a shipment of frozen rats.

programme.title: Borderforce: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Following the Department of Homeland Security Customs and Border Protection agency as they operate on the 28 bridges connecting the United States of America and Mexico.

programme.title: Guy Martin: Proper Jobs
programme.desc: Motorcycle racer, truck fitter, part-time farmer, enthusiastic engineer, and sometimes television presenter, Guy Martin attempts a variety of different roles that involve hard graft and no end of skill.

programme.title: Rick Steins Spain
programme.desc: Rick continues his journey in the old camper van from the Basque country on the Atlantic coast, to journey eastwards towards the Mediterranean, sampling great dishes and good hospitality along the way.

programme.title: Borderforce: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers pull over a businessman from Mexico who is making a rare journey to the US in a brand new car and a pedestrian gets more than he bargains for when he is mistaken for a wanted man.

programme.title: Borderforce: Americas Gatekeepers

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Clarkson reviews the Nissan GT-R and tests it out on the Fuji Speedway and James takes a look at the Renault Megane Coupe Concept. Judges from `Dragons Den Peter Jones and Theo Paphetis are the Stars in a Reasonably Priced Car.

programme.title: James May: My Sisters Top Toys
programme.desc: Poor James May. Stuck between his older and younger sisters, Jane and Sarah, his only toys were their hand-me-downs. Jane and Sarah do get their say, but not before James blows up the tree house family, races in a converted Silver Cross pram and makes over a Girls World head.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King explore our national love of picnics. With their unique banter and camaraderie, the duo create their ultimate al fresco lunch at Beaufort Polo Club; find out how our summer obsession evolved; celebrate picnic classics such as the cornish pasty and the scotch egg; bake a luxurious Dundee cake, and make a country terrine that would play centre stage in any outdoor feast.

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Comedians Hugh Dennis and David Baddiel drive over 2000km of Ethiopias bone shaking roads in a quest to reach Aksum, known as the home of the Ark of the Covenant. Along the way they have to compete with truck drivers high on local drug khat, a calamitous breakdown and a shortage of fuel in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Angus Deayton and Mariella Frostrup drive up Madagascars eastern coast during the tail end of the rainy season. This is a route with countless river crossings, offering Angus and Mariella a terrifying array of broken bridges and flimsy ferries as their only way across. The roads themselves are mired with thick mud, making progress increasingly painful and even forcing the pair to spend a night the car.

programme.desc: Louis travels to Portland, Oregon, the heart of a movement seeking to rewrite the rulebook on how we conduct intimate relationships and experience family life. Portland, whose city motto is `Keep Portland Weird, is seen as the US capital of polyamory and ethical non-monogamy, the practice of openly and transparently having multiple relationships that go further than just sex.

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel
programme.desc: Michael McIntyre hosts as Peter Andre, Rob Beckett, Patricia Bright, Reverend Richard Coles, John Barnes, Lucy Worsley and Ashley Roberts try to help a new set of contestants win a life-changing sum.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on a second spectacular rail journey through Alaska into Canada on the White Pass and Yukon railway. Arriving in Skagway by seaplane from railwayless Juneau, Michael heads first for Dyea and the Chilkoot trail, which the first gold prospectors hiked a hundred years ago to the Klondike. Among them, he discovers, was author, Jack London, whose stories of sled dogs captured the spirit of the gold rush.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores British Columbia, steered by his Appletons Guide to Canada, published in 1899. He discovers how two superpowers nearly came to war over a pig and joins the Royal Canadian Navy to firefight on board the frigate HMCS Regina. Starting on Vancouver Island, Michael explores the rich British heritage and colonial past of the provincial capital of British Columbia, Victoria.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: The Mathewson family continue their pursuit of classic cars. In the home counties, Derek picks up two expertly crafted replicas of the batmobile. Meanwhile, Dave struggles to contain his enthusiasm for a Second World War Ford jeep.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Paul picks up a stunning 1961 Vauxhall Cresta, Dave drools over a Ford Sierra Sapphire Cosworth, and Derek refuses a test drive in the worlds smallest production car, the 3.5 horsepower Peel P50.

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The story of Americas `Liberty Ships, which were produced in incredible numbers and became known as the Model T Fords of the ocean.

programme.title: War Factories
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Machine Gun
programme.desc: No matter how many soldiers you have, how smart your generals are or how daring your strategy is, a war will not be won if there is not enough bullets, planes or food.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team are at Trelissick House and gardens in Cornwall where the locals have dived into skips and cleared out their attics to bring along treasures in all shapes and sizes. There is a giant chair and an escape pod from a Vulcan bomber, whilst at the other end of the scale a miniature sewing kit and a gold snuff box with links to DH Lawrence prove that the best things do come in little packages.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team return to Helmingham Hall in Suffolk, home to the Tollemache family for 500 years, where treasures include a dazzling sapphire ring, a Girl Guide sketch by Robert Baden-Powell and an important collection of Native American artefacts. Glass expert Andy McConnell challenges the owner of a fine collection of mid-18th-century drinking glasses to identify the lone fake, while an intricate model of a butchers shop intrigues Fergus Gambon.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek is off to Bridlington to pick-up a trio of classics: a Morris 8 tourer, a Mini Van and a 1940s Morris LC3 truck.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads off to Blackpool to pick up a couple of unusual vehicles - a red 1970 Opel GT and a 1956 Ford Hot Rod pickup.

programme.title: Turkey with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon visits Istanbul, the beaches and crystal clear waters of the Aegean Sea, before ending up at the war torn border with Syria. He meets a producer now trying to sell wine in a Muslim country with an increasingly conservative government.

programme.title: Allo Allo!
programme.desc: Fanny and Leclercs wedding is timed to coincide with the execution of Michelles most audacious escape plan yet.

programme.title: Allo Allo!
programme.desc: Von Strohm, Gruber, Helga, and Bertorelli call General Von Flockenstoffen to deal with a mad General Von Klinkerhoffen, who wants to blow up the town.

programme.title: Allo Allo!
programme.desc: Newlyweds Fanny and Leclerc are sent to jail by the Germans, and Edith decides they have to be rescued - much to Renes horror.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Hartwood, a haunting facility in Scotland, ruins of an ancient city in Iraq and a scandal hit town in New Mexico.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a royal retreat caught in a web of corruption, an engineering marvel that is hidden behind the tourist attraction and natural wonder, the Niagara Falls, Canada, and a subterranean treasure.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Clutching his 1899 Appletons Guide, Michael Portillo boards one of the worlds most famous trains, the Rocky Mountaineer, to cross the backbone of the North American continent from Kamloops to the spa resort of Banff.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo begins a new journey on the tracks of the Ocean line to explore Canadas maritime provinces, en route to Quebec City. Clutching his 1899 Appletons Guide to Canada, he begins in the Atlantic port of Halifax, Nova Scotia, where he discovers an 18th century British hilltop citadel, manned at the time of his guide by the 78th Highland Regiment.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Its a first for the boys as they set their sights on a Saab. But when all hopes of a classic 99 are dashed, theyre forced to settle for a failed rally car.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: This week Will and Gus take on the classic Rover, with any losses coming out of their own pockets.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Guy sets his sights on a Citroen XM. The problem is, it is in France. If they can double their money, it will be worth the trip. But the car has some big problems.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will find an Audi Quattro roadster that has seen better days. It is full of problems and has not seen a service in years. Clearly, they need to buy it.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on a railroad journey from the City of Brotherly Love south to the first permanent English colonial settlement in North America, Jamestown. He feasts on a gargantuan Philly Cheesesteak, then looks to work off the calories with a run past the citys famous landmarks, in homage to one of Philadelphias most famous sons, Rocky Balboa. All pumped up, he heads to Pennsylvania University to tackle the football team under the instruction of a fearsome coach.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Armed with his Appletons Guide, Michael Portillo reaches a milestone on his American journey: the boundary between the northern and southern states, known as the Mason-Dixon line. He discovers the origins of what became for black Americans the border between slavery and freedom, in an 18th century English dispute over land. On the heritage Wilmington and Western Railroad, Michael meets Phoebe Snow, created to reassure passengers that clean burning coal wouldnt make their clothes dirty.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbies narrowboat gets a makeover before he explores the River Thames, he moors in Abingdon and tackles an emergency DIY repair to fix a leak.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie visits a former Beatles home in Henley, uncovers horror history in Marlow and struggles to find a mooring in Maidenhead on the River Thames.

programme.title: Equator
programme.desc: Simon Reeve takes a 25,000-mile journey around the Equator. He catches malaria in Gabon and struggles on through the war-ravaged Democratic Republic of Congo, goes rafting in the source of the Nile and witnesses a bullfight in Kenya. His journey ends in the desert on the Somalia border where thousands of refugees have escaped the fighting in their homeland.

programme.title: Equator
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels across Indonesia where he encounters paradise islands undiscovered by tourists and an environment under threat. In Sumatra and Borneo he meets orang-utans and gets adopted by headhunters. His journey ends on the island of Sulawesi, where he takes to the water with the Bajo sea gypsies.

programme.title: Equator
programme.desc: In the Galapagos Islands, Simon Reeve meets some of the most beautiful and unique wildlife on the planet. He climbs an active volcano in Ecuador, journeys across war-torn Colombia, meets an Indian tribe that have their own monument to the Equator and ends up in Brazil where he travels through the rainforest.

programme.title: Classic Car Kings
programme.desc: Irv imports an original-run short wheelbase Porsche 911 from the east coast of America. He needs to make it roadworthy, while keeping its incredible sun-faded patina.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.sub-title: MG Magnette; Morris Minor; De Tomaso Lomngchamp; Ford Escort Rally Car
programme.desc: Derek collects a pair of stylish British classics from a Yorkshire workshop, with the Morris 1000 finding a new home with a 10-year-old superfan.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: The Mathewsons sell a 1958 Bedford D122 and a 1969 Vanden Plas Princess. They also meet a collector who may be willing to finally part with his huge hot hatch collection.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Kalicharan
programme.desc: The under trial Kalicharan is sent as Prabhakar, a cop who is his look-a-like, to arrest a rich man named Deen Dayal.

programme.title: Jaan
programme.desc: Police Commisioner Suryadev Singh appoints Karan as Kajals bodyguard as she is facing danger from Vishamber. The truth is that Karan is Vishambers man who is sent to kill Kajal.

programme.title: Kisi Ka Bhai Kisi Ki Jaan
programme.desc: Bhaijaan, a self-avowed bachelor, decides to give up on violence when he falls in love with Bhagyalakshmi. Will he go back to his old ways when he learns about her familys rivalry with a gangster?

programme.title: Bade Miyan Chote Miyan
programme.desc: Two police officers switch identities to fool a murder witness, while their larcenous look-a-likes create more confusion.

programme.title: Tarla

programme.title: Kantara: A Legend - Chapter 1
